findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find datetime parsing functions in pydantic
 * @description Locate datetime parsing functions that accept numeric inputs
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity recommendation
 * @id py/pydantic-datetime-parsing
 * @tags datetime
 *        parsing
 *        numeric
 */

import python
import semmle.python.ApiGraphs

from DataFlow::CallCfgNode call
where
  // Look for pydantic datetime parsing functions
  call = API::moduleImport("pydantic").getMember("datetime_parse").getMember("parse_datetime").getACall()
  or
  call = API::moduleImport("pydantic").getMember("datetime_parse").getMember("parse_date").getACall()
  or
  call = API::moduleImport("pydantic").getMember("datetime_parse").getMember("parse_time").getACall()
  or
  // Look for functions that might accept numeric datetime inputs
  call = API::moduleImport("datetime").getMember("datetime").getACall()
  or
  call = API::moduleImport("datetime").getMember("fromtimestamp").getACall()
  or
  call = API::moduleImport("datetime").getMember("utcfromtimestamp").getACall()
select call, "Datetime parsing function that may accept numeric inputs"
findings.hypothesis: Identify datetime parsing functions in pydantic that accept numeric inputs, which could be vulnerable to infinity value handling issues

message.text: Datetime parsing function that may accept numeric inputs
Datetime parsing function that may accept numeric inputs
